mapper.select:
SELECT G.ID, G.COMP_CD, G.GR_NO, G.PO_ID, G.PO_NO, G.VD_CD, G.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(G.GR_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GR_YMD, G.TOT_AMT, G.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, G.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(G.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM GR_RECEIPT G LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='GR_STS' AND C.CD=G.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE G.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND (G.GR_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR G.PO_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR G.VD_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND G.STS = #{sts} ORDER BY G.ID DESC

SELECT G.ID, G.COMP_CD, G.GR_NO, G.PO_ID, G.PO_NO, G.VD_CD, G.VD_NM, G.OPER_ORG_CD, G.WH_CD, WH.CD_NM_KO AS WH_NM, G.DELY_NO, TO_CHAR(G.GR_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GR_YMD, G.INSP_USR_ID, TO_CHAR(G.INSP_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS INSP_YMD, G.TOT_AMT, G.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, G.REMARK, G.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(G.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM GR_RECEIPT G LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='GR_STS' AND C.CD=G.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE WH ON WH.GRP_CD='WH' AND WH.CD=G.WH_CD AND WH.DEL_YN='N' WHERE G.ID = #{id} AND G.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT ID, RECEIPT_ID, LINE_NO, PO_ITEM_ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, PO_QTY, GR_QTY, INSP_PASS_QTY, INSP_FAIL_QTY, PRC, TAX_TYP, AMT, INSP_RESULT, LOT_NO, TO_CHAR(MFG_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS MFG_YMD, TO_CHAR(EXP_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EXP_YMD, REMARK FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM WHERE RECEIPT_ID = #{receiptId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GR_RECEIPT (COMP_CD, GR_NO, PO_ID, PO_NO, VD_CD, VD_NM, OPER_ORG_CD, WH_CD, DELY_NO, GR_YMD, INSP_USR_ID, INSP_YMD, TOT_AMT, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{grNo}, #{poId}, #{poNo}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{operOrgCd}, #{whCd}, #{delyNo}, TO_DATE(#{grYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{inspUsrId}, TO_DATE(#{inspYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{totAmt},0), NVL(#{sts},'TMP'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE GR_RECEIPT SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE GR_RECEIPT SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GR_RECEIPT_ITEM (RECEIPT_ID, LINE_NO, PO_ITEM_ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, PO_QTY, GR_QTY, INSP_PASS_QTY, INSP_FAIL_QTY, PRC, TAX_TYP, AMT, INSP_RESULT, LOT_NO, MFG_YMD, EXP_YMD, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{receiptId}, #{lineNo}, #{poItemId}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{spec}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{poQty},0), NVL(#{grQty},0), NVL(#{inspPassQty},0), NVL(#{inspFailQty},0), NVL(#{prc},0), NVL(#{taxTyp},'TAX'), NVL(#{amt},0), NVL(#{inspResult},'PASS'), #{lotNo}, TO_DATE(#{mfgYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{expYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM', 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select:
SELECT O.ID AS PO_ID, O.PO_NO, O.VD_CD, O.VD_NM, O.OPER_ORG_CD, O.TOT_AMT FROM PO_ORDER O WHERE O.DEL_YN='N' AND O.STS='PC' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PO_ORDER_ITEM I WHERE I.ORDER_ID=O.ID AND I.QTY > I.GR_QTY)
AND (O.PO_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR O.VD_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY O.ID DESC
SELECT O.ID AS PO_ID, O.PO_NO, O.VD_CD, O.VD_NM, O.OPER_ORG_CD, O.WH_CD FROM PO_ORDER O WHERE O.ID = #{poId} AND O.DEL_YN='N'

SELECT I.ID AS PO_ITEM_ID, I.ITEM_CD, I.ITEM_NM, I.SPEC, I.UNIT_CD, I.QTY AS PO_QTY, (I.QTY - I.GR_QTY) AS REMAIN_QTY, (I.QTY - I.GR_QTY) AS GR_QTY, I.PRC, I.TAX_TYP FROM PO_ORDER_ITEM I WHERE I.ORDER_ID = #{poId} AND (I.QTY - I.GR_QTY) > 0 ORDER BY I.LINE_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE PO_ORDER_ITEM SET GR_QTY = GR_QTY + #{qty}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{poItemId}
